case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. MINDY R SIEBRING

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIEBRING, MINDY R $9,168.65 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,463.15, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200012082)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-14-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SIEBRING, MINDY R SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
